title: thelycrania microcarpa
intro: Thelycrania microcarpa, also known as Thelycrania, is a plant species native to Australia, belonging to the family Thelycranaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Thelycrania microcarpa include its potential to treat various conditions such as eczema, dermatitis, and skin irritations, due to its anti-inflammatory and soothing effects. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and creams, which are used topically to alleviate skin conditions.
